sprint.goal: Effective implementation of Hi-Fi v2, starting with ROSS
sprint.summary: Turn the v2 ROSS scaffold into a real, data-wired feature. v2 stays flag-ON behind /ross.html until soaked. After the IA reframe (2026-04-30): v1 admin tabs are reframed as 'Ross's playbook' — the ruleset and procedures the future AI agent runs against. Concierge-first IA: home stays the front door; Playbook / Activity / People are deeper governance destinations.

phases.name: Project Status dashboard + sidebar cleanup
phases.summary: Self-meta tracker built in Hi-Fi v2; sidebar bug fixes (active state, FA icons, BS5 syntax, grouping). PR #16. CORS fix for preview channels: PR #17.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — gap analysis & spec
phases.summary: Spec doc + IA audit (docs/plans/2026-04-30-ross-v2-implementation.md). Audit finding: home feed already wired behind ROSS_HOME_REAL_DATA flag. PR #18.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — wire right-rail + first-run findings
phases.summary: getHomeSidebar() reads queue/{loc}/entries + bookings + lapsed VIPs. getFirstRunFindings() ships 1 real (best-day-of-week) + 2 illustrative (data sources missing). PR #19.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — action handlers + snooze
phases.summary: dispatch(action, card) helper bound to every card button. New rossV2Snooze Cloud Function (deployed) + ross/v2Snoozes/{uid}/{cardId} RTDB node + read-side filter. Snooze action present on all 6 fallback cards + 3 detector cards. PR #20.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — admin redesign (concierge-first IA)
phases.summary: IA reframe: v1 admin = Ross's playbook (rules + procedures the AI agent runs against), not staff CRUD. 6 v1 tabs collapse to 3: Playbook (workflows + builder + templates), Activity (reports + run history), People (staff). Single SPA on /ross.html with ?tab= routing. Concierge home stays default; tabs are deeper destinations. v1 admin reachable at admin-dashboard.html#rossContent stays as rollback. Splitting into 4a/4b/4c branches.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — askRoss (LLM)
phases.summary: Now more central, not less: ROSS-as-AI-agent IS the product. Anthropic-backed rossChat CF + eval harness + cost cap. Separate sprint.

tasks.label: Phase 0 — Project Status + sidebar cleanup + CORS preview fix
Phase 3 — Action handlers + snooze CF deployed
IA reframe: v1 = agent's playbook, concierge-first navigation
Phase 4a — Playbook tab (read-only): list workflows + templates by category
Phase 4b — Activity tab: run history + reports
Phase 4d — Playbook editing/creation flows (consolidates v1 Builder)

recentlyCompleted.title: docs(ross-v2): phase 1 — gap analysis & implementation spec
fix(cors): allow Firebase Hosting preview channels

high: Food cost open PR — review and merge
medium: Hi-Fi v2 → v1 promotions (guests, queue, analytics, campaigns, receipts)
Sidebar dedup of v2 vs v1 entries (after v2 promotion)
Project status auto-derive from PROJECT_BACKLOG.md (drop manual sync)
